h74bb7b42g667ag44c7gab5age3b3e518d8c7: *You discreetly take the box from where you'd hidden it and turn it over in your hands.*
hf6ad6da7g966eg4954g9a09g31aac66c8b13: *The runes engraved on the black metal mean nothing to you. You keep examining it.*
h0551f873g8030g4655g90bag23e84e495d21: *There are no openings, but for a brief moment, you think you feel something stir within.*
ha68abafagf3cag4902g9a28gadaeb0ea207f: *You tuck it away again. Your duty is to deliver it - not understand it.*
h56414fdag0ae6g4ebagb8d5g02f8f528f3e1: Damn thing... it has to open, surely. It has to do something.
hdfe16cf8g9003g4473g99aeg397e15c2cda2: *Shadowheart's attention is consumed by a strange box that she turns over in her hands.*
he3b17179g6989g42aag9f43g44596c5ee56e: *Shadowheart's attention is consumed by a strange box that she turns over in her hands.*
h5d9c2735g190eg4b6fgb171g81f45fabe73e: *The box is inscribed with glyphs similar to those used by the githyanki.*
hb2477750g83a6g4cd8g8639gc4ceaa452cb8: A githyanki artefact. How did you come by that?
h37d3ec20g45ceg497ega759gc1bb2ce262a4: *In an instant, Shadowheart hides the box from view.*
hc9ed5bceg5c2eg403egb851g49f72381bf6f: It's nothing, trust me. Beautiful evening, isn't it?
hf95bd477gb9f5g4564gade2g796217a33e9c: You can really appreciate the darkness out here in the wilds. Not like in the city, where they keep lamps burning all hours. It's not natural.
hb9eded66g5e13g4345g8cafg95a226625ee5: I do like the dark. It's peaceful.
hbb107757ga263g423dg835fg8b34a23de442: Quite right. On that note, I think I'd like some time alone, if you don't mind. To meditate. We'll talk soon.
h8b7c6107gecf4g4ee2gbc58gf654ea86f276: No harm in brightening up the gloom. It's comforting, safe.
hf25e647fg20d4g4632gb0cfgfa97054e81ac: To some, perhaps. But I'll enjoy the dark while I can. Alone, if you don't mind.
hae0f6e47g87ccg46fbga90eg77a06e8dc4d3: I almost let you get away with changing the subject. Tell me about the artefact.
hf2ce45aag40feg4576gbcffg1af2f254cd8b: You deserve honesty more than most... but please, don't ask.
ha5c6f092g8164g4cebgba65g029107655716: Very well. When you are ready to speak your mind, I shall listen.
h87b04e45g2a36g499ega3d8g57798b4b0ca1: All right, I can respect that. But if you want to talk, I'm here.
ha74ff34fg6e12g42afgb1d1g39c73844ae28: I can't promise that'll be any time soon, but thank you, all the same.
h6b9d0546g573bg4dedgb1a2g9dec72fae847: A poor answer. I expected more openness from you.
h3512aa1ag7d67g418egb065g33ef34bf655d: Not much of an answer. I'd hoped for more openness.
h091267f9gd0adg4a87gaeb8ge90331b82786: I'm sorry. I can't give you that. Not right now.
h47d61053gd080g4a17gb90egeecc88ad7f3f: The evening's aesthetics do not matter. Why are you toying with an heirloom of my people?
h78e6e902g5cf0g45d0gbfa0g75b8d8fb4eff: Why're you so keen to dodge questions about that thing?
he5a66b7dgea70g47c5ga51fgfc06e059cca9: Use the parasite - see what she's hiding.
h4f5cea6cgaa08g48a0gaaa2gf42a750662c9: *You feel Shadowheart's deep protectiveness of the artefact. Though she doesn't understand it, she believes that her fate is entwined with it somehow.*
h9abcc607ge1d9g455bg8165g35ed4014b4f8: Keep focused. Whatever that thing is, it's not important.
h8a97f3fag3957g4e06g8cbfg34e6ec908d70: That's not for you to decide. There's a world beyond us. I'd like to be alone now, please.
h0d5b0c53g3684g4707gaddegdc0493ae2642: Admit it - there's a cure for ceremorphosis in that thing, isn't there?
h5ec83fe3g874cg4f6bgbbb2g842d8de59a04: Exactly. I'm just waiting for you to get really desperate before naming my price.
h64d620f7g21e1g4249gb677g879db908d0e1: I'd like some time alone now. We'll talk soon.
h60ce6197g84bag4509gb851ga227b9b13684: Remember, our fates are entwined now. Relics and secrets don't matter with what we're facing.
h69f2f108gb6eeg4356gb060g69e31abe24d0: I wish that was true. But I've seen plenty of blood spilled for just those kinds of things. The world will keep on scheming, no matter what happens to us.
hc68a7fafg09e5g4ddcg95b3gbc503cd96a47: For someone so secretive, you really seem like you want to open up.
h52f16a43gec0eg46c6g8526g87c56891f2c5: I do. But I won't. Not yet.
hf5bb379ag3492g4829ga75fga68f422a86b5: I do. But I won't. I can't.
h68a48698g1f6dg439bga25cgd29fe2ab3cb7: Don't be so cynical. It won't help us.
h438330f1g0162g4b3dga9fag479c866e3e7d: It won't. But I prefer it to just being frightened. I'd like to be alone now, please.
hae6cbdcfg6d37g4fc3ga3d9g31047dfe06b1: If you don't want to talk any more, I'll respect that.
h7e834aecg306ag4955g91f4g864e101655d1: Thank you. We can talk again soon.
h6663fe19g19fag4de2gaac6g31de47497e45: I felt that - are you really surprised I won't open up when you keep trying to fumble in my head? Leave me alone.
h654441dbg4247g48b9gb582ge958495bc84f: I felt that - are you really surprised I won't open up when you try to fumble in my head? Leave me alone.
h2d7fabcagbc3eg49dagbe6fg8f748626bcc4: Never mind. Private matter, that's all.
h840c5e28gdf73g4cd1gad6agb7703d288a08: Now, how're you faring this evening?
h9a73d172g5630g4610gbe36g9f33d72af40b: Don't change the subject - tell me about the artefact.
h04776b54ga917g449dg9a26g2fa02e92a251: I've told you all I'm going to tell you. Now please don't pry any further, or you might force me to become less polite.
h3df8c94bg037ag4771g834bg5144b85bea72: Good. Now I believe I was asking you how you were this evening?
h4ecd9f68g2c2ag4634gb197g65a194742235: Better than I'd expected, all things considered.
h00532aeagb21cg4ad6gbc66gc928fa0f0dd7: The nomad's life has its charms. You get to meet such interesting people - and sometimes they don't even try to kill you.
hc45351b4g68f8g4149gaaebg76a7fc299df4: Honestly, the parasite frightens me more than anything else we've encountered.
hc6202162g10aeg413dg88f7gba6a27401be2: I suppose you're right - I'm glad I met you, for one.
he38e0e9bg1609g4510gb637g3fbf17d3ee5b: My, quite charming when you want to be, aren't you? Maybe save some for the next time we have to talk our way past a sentry or the like.
h05561c26g39c8g4301gb3d0g45dd1fdcdac8: We should get some rest. I doubt tomorrow will be any easier than today.
h43cad035g374cg4e5cg9447g93dba657897c: Interesting? The company's the worst part, as I see it.
hc46896d1g027bg45e5ga7b8g7159282586ba: Honestly? Miserable. I'd rather spend the night just about anywhere else but here.
hddd86e8bg7da4g4e58g9b0cg85367b2ccb77: Oh. You don't say that because of the company, I hope?
hab2416ffgae37g46f6g8fbag1398be8f20ed: The company's fine. It's the constant danger and thought of becoming a monster that bothers me.
he18f94e8gbbbbg4ce4ga63cg4c70ddd54213: I know how you feel, trust me. But there's not much we can do until morning.
hfed1949ag8c02g49b3g9081g69a3ecc6405d: You should get some rest. Things will seem better come morning. I hope.
h6d8ab1abgd11ag4e3bg960fg29c0b17636ee: No. Especially not when I have you around.
h9ba6a77bg9f5eg4d2egbfdcgd4f4a048cb9d: Oh stop, you can hardly be that miserable if you have energy for flirting.
h3d6986d2g05e2g42dfgb947gd349eecf5263: Hmm. In that case, let me spare you the worst. Good night.
h85595ba2ge890g48b1gb71bgda55d19b1929: Not good enough. I want answers.
h2fb282ccg346cg4e34gb064g4213e5841274: Then go read a book, or pray to your god of choice - just leave me alone.
he6c93cf0g1974g4335g8ba4g995ecf227c2c: I'm being interrupted, that's what. We can talk later.
h354a6492g9a51g4ae6g9948g01e553852962: No need to be so secretive. You can trust me.
h4a510777g8264g4b78gbb7fgb060ec25a562: Our mutual... respect only entitles you to so much. Now, if you don't mind.
hd3731668gc5f3g4003ga490g4e63724efb28: A bold statement, if not an accurate one. Leave me be.
hc40e491dg1080g4f1bg8f17g02ce2453c968: Speak plainly. What are you doing with a Gith artefact?
h783955adg8591g4b8cg89d8g4800c0f4a0ed: I said keep out of it. In fact, forget it entirely.
hb48978c3g03beg41feg9648gd546ca5052ad: My kin's heirlooms should not be in your hands.
h8b9e1d40g515eg4c29ga55cg70c9e10b9a06: I could crack open that little thing in one fist, if you want me to.
h23caba8dgf43bg4b0bgb40agd5a0e9d669c3: Let me try - I always enjoy opening up what I'm not supposed to.
hd1f118f2g9e91g4b8bga208g8bbd3e275913: *The box is inscribed with unfamiliar glyphs.*
h889a8c0dg26d5g405cga046g050f3298fee4: Damn thing... it has to open, surely. It has to do something.
